channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Intradialytic exercise program did not improve dialysis adequacy
item.description: A 4-week pedaling exercise during dialysis was safe but did not significantly improve dialysis adequacy measures.

item.title: Off-the-Shelf CAR T Therapy Shows Early Activity in NHL
item.description: Researchers studied an allogeneic CD19-targeted CAR T-cell therapy in patients with relapsed/refractory B-cell non-Hodgkin lymphoma.

item.title: Low-dose buprenorphine may sustain ketamine's benefits for suicidal ideation
item.description: Research in the American Journal of Psychiatry found that low-dose buprenorphine after a single ketamine infusion significantly reduced suicidal ideation.

item.title: Smart wearable wristband may detect cardiac arrest
item.description: A smart-technology wristband device may automatically detect cardiac arrest, potentially enabling faster medical assistance.
